name: EQUILLIUM INC.  DL-,0001
summary: EQUILLIUM INC. DL-,0001 is a biotechnology company focused on developing and commercializing novel therapies for severe neuroinflammatory disorders. Their lead product candidate is diazepam nasal spray (EQ001) for the treatment of seizure clusters. Equillium is headquartered in La Jolla, California.
